query: SELECT a.localId, a.businessOwnerId, a.date, a.time, a.paymentStatus, a.stripePaymentIntentId, c.firstName, c.lastName FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN clients c ON a.clientId = c.id WHERE a.businessOwnerId = 1620003 AND a.date = '2026-05-11' ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
